title: Implement push retry with backoff in worker autopilot
description: Per MTASK-0111 decision (option C): modify worker_mtask_autopilot.sh to add push_with_retry() function. On git push failure: (1) git pull --rebase origin main, (2) sleep random 5-15s, (3) retry push. Max 3 attempts. If all fail, log 'PUSH_FAILED_MAX_RETRIES' as warning and continue loop without aborting. Apply to all push calls in the script: heartbeat push, result push, status push. Verify by running one push cycle and confirming no errors.
